title: Add StoryWeaver to writing
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [StoryWeaver](https://carvalholuciano.github.io/storyweaver/) to writing
- StoryWeaver is a single-page web app using pure HTML/CSS/JS with no backend that turns a

Fixes #11799

gist.headline: StoryWeaver joins the hive
gist.blurb: A new community app just landed in the Greenhouse! StoryWeaver is a pure frontend web app that spins up stories using Pollinations.
gist.summary: Added StoryWeaver, a new single-page HTML/CSS/JS web app, to the community apps directory under the writing category.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use StoryWeaver to generate stories directly from the community showcase.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about 'StoryWeaver', a writing app. Visuals should include a loom or weaving wheel made of glowing code, books, and a writing desk. Polly the bee wearing a tiny author's cap or reading glasses, weaving a story or reading a book.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, sitting at a wooden desk weaving a glowing scroll of text on a small magical loom. A stack of colorful books sits nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
